title: Moonfleet
writer: Jan Lustig, Margaret Fitts, J. Meade Falkner
actors: Stewart Granger, George Sanders, Joan Greenwood
plot: A young orphan is sent to the village of Moonfleet in Dorset, England to stay with his mother's former lover, who has the facade of a gentleman but leads a gang of swashbuckling bootleggers; the duo go on a treasure hunt.
